Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Barbarian - The Ultimate Warrior (Side 1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $a840 lda #$37 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Barbarian - The Ultimate Warrior (Side 1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Inserted byte packed colour RAM data (512 bytes) to dump file at $A840 to restore before starting the game.
